form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 2.25 lengths win at Bulli over 400m in 22.52. Should be prominent.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 2.25 lengths win at Bulli over 400m in 22.52. Should be prominent.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn came together, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (20.61) over 365m at this track. Has a low draw. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (20.61) over 365m at this track. Has a low draw. Solid top-three prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight and again approaching the finish.

form.formComment: Finished seventh last start at Richmond Straight but prior to that had been racing consistently. Boxed awkwardly and prefer each-way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished seventh last start at Richmond Straight but prior to that had been racing consistently. Boxed awkwardly and prefer each-way.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (20.77) over 365m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (20.77) over 365m at this track. Hard to entertain this time.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance showing plenty of speed to score by 4.5 lengths in a Free For All last start at Bulli, clocking a lightning 18.84 over the 340m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance showing plenty of speed to score by 4.5 lengths in a Free For All last start at Bulli, clocking a lightning 18.84 over the 340m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at The Gardens to win by 2.25 lengths in 15.66, beating Weffalee Shield. Last start finished 4th over 400m at The Gardens beaten 6 lengths (23.18) behind Jasper Darke in a NG on April 2. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
